mapper.sql:
st.company_id = #{companyId} and upper(coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK')) = 'MANAGER_EVALUATION' and upper(coalesce(st.stage, '')) = 'COMPLETED' and upper(coalesce(st.target_role, '')) = 'MANAGER'
and st.survey_template_id = #{templateId}
and si.responder_user_id = #{managerUserId}
and date(coalesce(sr.submitted_at, si.sent_at, si.created_at)) >= cast(#{startDate} as date)
and date(coalesce(sr.submitted_at, si.sent_at, si.created_at)) <= cast(#{endDate} as date)
and ( lower(coalesce(ep.employee_name, eu.full_name, '')) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(coalesce(ep.employee_email, eu.email, '')) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(coalesce(mu.full_name, '')) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(coalesce(mu.email, '')) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') )
and sr.survey_response_id is not null
and sr.survey_response_id is null and upper(coalesce(si.status, '')) not in ('EXPIRED', 'CANCELLED')
and upper(coalesce(si.status, '')) = upper(#{status})
mapper.select:
select si.survey_instance_id, si.status as survey_status, si.sent_at, si.closed_at, st.survey_template_id, st.name as template_name, oi.onboarding_id, oi.completed_at,
coalesce(ep.user_id, eu.user_id, oi.employee_id) as employee_user_id, coalesce(ep.employee_name, eu.full_name) as employee_name, coalesce(ep.employee_email, eu.email) as employee_email, coalesce(ep.job_title, '') as job_title, coalesce(d.name, '') as department_name,
si.responder_user_id as manager_user_id, mu.full_name as manager_name, mu.email as manager_email,
sr.survey_response_id, sr.overall_score, sr.submitted_at from survey_instances si join survey_templates st on st.company_id = si.company_id and st.survey_template_id = si.survey_template_id join onboarding_instances oi on oi.company_id = si.company_id and oi.onboarding_id = si.onboarding_id left join employee_profiles ep on ep.company_id = si.company_id and (ep.employee_id = oi.employee_id or ep.user_id = oi.employee_id) left join users eu on eu.company_id = si.company_id and eu.user_id = coalesce(ep.user_id, oi.employee_id) left join departments d on d.company_id = si.company_id and d.department_id = ep.department_id left join users mu on mu.company_id = si.company_id and mu.user_id = si.responder_user_id left join survey_responses sr on sr.company_id = si.company_id and sr.survey_instance_id = si.survey_instance_id where order by coalesce(sr.submitted_at, si.sent_at, si.created_at) desc

select si.survey_instance_id, sr.survey_response_id, sq.survey_question_id, sq.content as question_content, coalesce(sa.question_type, sq.type) as question_type, coalesce(sa.dimension_code, sq.dimension_code) as dimension_code, sa.value_rating, sa.value_choice, sa.value_choices::text as value_choices, sa.value_text, sr.submitted_at from survey_instances si join survey_templates st on st.company_id = si.company_id and st.survey_template_id = si.survey_template_id join onboarding_instances oi on oi.company_id = si.company_id and oi.onboarding_id = si.onboarding_id left join employee_profiles ep on ep.company_id = si.company_id and (ep.employee_id = oi.employee_id or ep.user_id = oi.employee_id) left join users eu on eu.company_id = si.company_id and eu.user_id = coalesce(ep.user_id, oi.employee_id) left join users mu on mu.company_id = si.company_id and mu.user_id = si.responder_user_id join survey_responses sr on sr.company_id = si.company_id and sr.survey_instance_id = si.survey_instance_id join survey_answers sa on sa.company_id = sr.company_id and sa.survey_response_id = sr.survey_response_id left join survey_questions sq on sq.company_id = sa.company_id and sq.survey_question_id = sa.survey_question_id where order by sr.submitted_at desc, sq.sort_order asc
